title:
Готуємося протидіяти: на південних українських землях, які перебувають зараз під окупацією, росія планує фактично такі ж процеси грабунку й деіндустріалізації, які провела на території захопленого Донбасу, — Зеленський за результатами доповіді ГУР

Планується здійснення геологічної розвідки, швидкий
body:
Готуємося протидіяти: на південних українських землях, які перебувають зараз під окупацією, росія планує фактично такі ж процеси грабунку й деіндустріалізації, які провела на території захопленого Донбасу, — Зеленський за результатами доповіді ГУР

Планується здійснення геологічної розвідки, швидкий видобуток і вивезення цінної сировини зі щонайменше 18 родовищ, а саме: титану, літію, танталу, ніобію, циркону, молібдену та графіту. Окупанти планують і подальші заходи щодо захоплення та вивезення цьогорічного врожаю зерна.

🫡https://t.me/operativnoZSU/

title:
🇮🇷🇺🇸| BREAKING: According to Iranian think tank Meshkat, the wreckage belongs to a MQ-9A Extended Range USAF drone.

This means that Iran shot down a hostile MQ-9 Reaper drone during a joint UAE-US operation near the Strait of Hormoz, this week.

Meshkat analysed and came to the conclusion that the
body:
🇮🇷🇺🇸| BREAKING: According to Iranian think tank Meshkat, the wreckage belongs to a MQ-9A Extended Range USAF drone.

This means that Iran shot down a hostile MQ-9 Reaper drone during a joint UAE-US operation near the Strait of Hormoz, this week.

Meshkat analysed and came to the conclusion that the wreckage belongs to a MQ-9A Extended Range, which is a newer US-operated version with longer endurance.

This would be 25th visual proof of a downed MQ-9 in Iran.

@FotrosResistancee

body:
🇮🇷📉🛢️🇺🇸Due to a possible deal to end the immoral war on Iran.

Brent crude futures declined more than 6 percent to about $100 a barrel, while US oil prices slid nearly 7 percent to $95 a barrel. Both benchmarks had shed about 4 percent in the previous session.

Traders are closely monitoring the situation in the Strait of Hormuz, after Trump paused his bogus “Project Freedom” initiative to force ships navigate the waterway.

title:
❗️Iran denies UAE attacks, warns of “decisive and regret-inducing” response

Iran’s armed forces denied carrying out any recent missile or drone attacks against the UAE, with state media IRIB citing a spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters who said no such operations had taken place
body:
❗️Iran denies UAE attacks, warns of “decisive and regret-inducing” response

Iran’s armed forces denied carrying out any recent missile or drone attacks against the UAE, with state media IRIB citing a spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters who said no such operations had taken place and that any action would have been “clearly and officially announced.” 

The spokesman dismissed UAE Defense Ministry accusations as “baseless,” while warning that any attack launched against Iran from UAE territory would trigger a “decisive and regret-inducing” retaliation, and urged Abu Dhabi not to allow its territory to be used by US or Israeli forces.

body:
❗️Iranian Foreign Ministry condemns UAE for cooperating with US & Israel:

"The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran, while condemning the destructive actions of the rulers of Abu Dhabi in coordination with hostile parties against Iran—including the continued hosting of their bases and military equipment—warns them of the dangerous consequences of this situation for regional peace and stability.

Over the past two days, alongside the intensification of unlawful actions and provocative movements by US forces in the region and their maritime activities under the pretext of “freedom of navigation,” officials in Abu Dhabi have also taken positions contrary to the principles of good neighborliness and the Charter of the United Nations by cooperating with hostile sides and

body:
❗️Hezbollah announced three additional operations on 5 May 2026 in response to Israeli violations, bringing the total to 18

• Targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Rashaf at 16:30 using an attack drone.

• Targeted the newly established Blat position in south Lebanon at 18:00 with a rocket barrage.

• Targeted Israeli military vehicles in Wadi al-Jamal, between Mays al-Jabal and Houla, at 18:15 with artillery shells.

title:
❗️China calls US-Israeli war on Iran illegitimate, urges ceasefire and talks

China said the US–Israeli war against Iran is illegitimate during talks in Beijing between Foreign Minister Wang Yi and his Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi, stressing the need to reduce tensions, achieve a full ceasefir
body:
❗️China calls US-Israeli war on Iran illegitimate, urges ceasefire and talks

China said the US–Israeli war against Iran is illegitimate during talks in Beijing between Foreign Minister Wang Yi and his Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi, stressing the need to reduce tensions, achieve a full ceasefire, and move toward direct negotiations. 

Araghchi welcomed China’s stance condemning the war and said cooperation between Tehran and Beijing will grow stronger.

title:
⭕️ LEBANON: Overnight and into the morning, Israeli attacks intensified across multiple areas in southern Lebanon and the western Bekaa, alongside continued exchanges of fire.

Shortly after midnight, an airstrike targeted the town of Baraachit. At dawn, a strike in Deir Kifa hit paramedics from the
body:
⭕️ LEBANON: Overnight and into the morning, Israeli attacks intensified across multiple areas in southern Lebanon and the western Bekaa, alongside continued exchanges of fire.

Shortly after midnight, an airstrike targeted the town of Baraachit. At dawn, a strike in Deir Kifa hit paramedics from the Islamic Health Authority, wounding three.

By early morning, the escalation expanded geographically. At approximately 08:18 AM, an Israeli airstrike struck Zilaya in the western Bekaa. Minutes later, a drone strike targeted Mayfadoun.

Around the same time, the Israeli military reported intercepting a suspicious aerial target over southern Lebanon and launching an interceptor toward another target. The army also said that Hezbollah had launched rockets, explosive drones, and mortar shells, some

title:
❗️Australia invests billions in fuel security as Hormuz blockade threatens supplies

Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has unveiled a 10 billion dollar package designed to fortify the country’s energy sovereignty against growing maritime instability. The initiative establishes a government-
body:
❗️Australia invests billions in fuel security as Hormuz blockade threatens supplies

Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has unveiled a 10 billion dollar package designed to fortify the country’s energy sovereignty against growing maritime instability. The initiative establishes a government-owned reserve of approximately one billion liters, ensuring the nation maintains at least 50 days of fuel supplies on its own shores. This move seeks to insulate the domestic economy from the volatility of international energy markets and the precarious nature of global shipping lanes.

The decision follows mounting pressure on Australia’s energy infrastructure, which currently relies on imports for 80 percent of its fuel needs. Localized shortages have already begun to surface across the contin

During the conversation, both sides reviewed the latest regional developments and emphasized the importance of continuing diplomatic efforts and cooperation among regional countries to prevent and de-escalate tensions.

title:
❗️Spain urges EU to shield ICC, UN as Gaza genocide continues

Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez called on the European Commission on 6 May to activate the Anti-Coercion Instrument to protect the independence of the International Criminal Court (ICC) and the UN, as well as their efforts to end th
body:
❗️Spain urges EU to shield ICC, UN as Gaza genocide continues

Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez called on the European Commission on 6 May to activate the Anti-Coercion Instrument to protect the independence of the International Criminal Court (ICC) and the UN, as well as their efforts to end the genocide in Gaza.

“We ask the Commission to activate the Anti-Coercion Instrument, to protect the independence of the International Criminal Court and the United Nations, and their actions to end the genocide in Gaza,” Sanchez said on X.

Sanchez said Spain would “not look the other way,” warning that punitive measures against those who defend international justice threaten the wider human rights system.

The Spanish premier added that the EU cannot remain a bystander “in the face of this per

title:
❗️US petrol prices surge 50% amid Hormuz disruption and war on Iran 

Petrol prices in the United States have climbed sharply, reaching an average of $4.48 per gallon, according to the American Automobile Association (AAA), after rising 31 cents in the past week alone. Prices are now 50 percent high
body:
❗️US petrol prices surge 50% amid Hormuz disruption and war on Iran 

Petrol prices in the United States have climbed sharply, reaching an average of $4.48 per gallon, according to the American Automobile Association (AAA), after rising 31 cents in the past week alone. Prices are now 50 percent higher than before the US–Israel war on Iran, reflecting mounting pressure on global energy markets.

The spike is tied directly to disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz, where a significant share of the world’s oil supply normally passes. Ongoing hostilities and blockages in the waterway have left tankers stranded, tightening supply and driving crude prices higher. Analysts warn that as long as flows remain constrained, upward pressure on fuel prices will persist, with a “fundamental shortfall” in gl

title:
❗️US struggles to curb flow of Chinese drone components to Iran & Russia

Small Chinese firms are openly exporting dual-use drone parts, such as engines, batteries, fiber-optic cables, and microchips, to both countries, often bypassing or ignoring US restrictions.

One company, Xiamen Victory Techno
body:
❗️US struggles to curb flow of Chinese drone components to Iran & Russia

Small Chinese firms are openly exporting dual-use drone parts, such as engines, batteries, fiber-optic cables, and microchips, to both countries, often bypassing or ignoring US restrictions.

One company, Xiamen Victory Technology, has reportedly marketed German-designed L550 drone engines linked to Iran’s Shahed-136 attack drones during recent regional conflicts.

US officials say curbing this trade is challenging, as drones rely on widely available commercial components that move easily through global supply chains. Many of these suppliers are small businesses with limited exposure to US penalties and are increasingly operating in the open.

(WSJ)

title:
❗️Poll shows US public rejecting Trump war on Iran

A new PBS News/NPR/Marist poll shows Trump’s war on Iran is becoming a serious political liability, with 60 percent of US citizens disapproving of his handling of Iran and 61 percent saying US military action has done more harm than good. 

The bac
body:
❗️Poll shows US public rejecting Trump war on Iran

A new PBS News/NPR/Marist poll shows Trump’s war on Iran is becoming a serious political liability, with 60 percent of US citizens disapproving of his handling of Iran and 61 percent saying US military action has done more harm than good. 

The backlash is being fueled by soaring gas prices, wider economic strain, and growing anger over the cost of the war at home.

Sixty-three percent blame Trump for high gas prices, while 62 percent say he has weakened the US role on the world stage. 

The findings point to deep trouble for Republicans ahead of the midterms, with Democrats leading on the generic ballot and showing stronger voter enthusiasm.

title:
❗️Netanyahu appoints Israeli settler who called for ethnic cleansing of Palestinians to lead state land authority

Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has finalized the appointment of Yehuda Eliyahu, a hardline settler and long-time ally of Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich, to head the Israel
body:
❗️Netanyahu appoints Israeli settler who called for ethnic cleansing of Palestinians to lead state land authority

Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has finalized the appointment of Yehuda Eliyahu, a hardline settler and long-time ally of Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich, to head the Israel Land Authority. Eliyahu, the co-founder of the settler organization Regavim, will now manage 92 percent of state land and a multi-billion shekel budget. The move has been hailed by cabinet ministers as a strategic shift aimed at altering the demographic balance in the Galilee and Negev, signaling towards unprecedented escalation in the dispossession of Palestinian citizens within the 1948 territories.

The appointment comes despite significant legal opposition and warnings regarding Eliyahu’s h

title: ❗️According to reports from Israeli Channel 15, two Israeli soldiers were wounded after a pair of Hezbollah kamikaze drones detonated in close proximity to their position. The injured personnel were evacuated to a hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified of the incident.
body:
❗️According to reports from Israeli Channel 15, two Israeli soldiers were wounded after a pair of Hezbollah kamikaze drones detonated in close proximity to their position. The injured personnel were evacuated to a hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified of the incident.

The network further noted that within the last hour, Hezbollah has launched a series of explosive drones and rocket salvos targeting occupation forces in southern Lebanon. In a separate engagement during the same period, the Israeli Air Force reportedly intercepted a "hostile aerial target" over the region.

body: UPDATE | An Israeli airstrike from earlier today on the town of Zilaya, located in Lebanon's western Bekaa, has resulted in the deaths of 4 people and at least 5 others wounded.

דיווח באתר ״אקסיוס״ מפי מספר גורמים אמריקנים ומקורות נוספים על כך שהבית הלבן מאמין שהוא מתקרב להסכם עם איראן על מזכר הבנות. מטרת המזכר היא לסיים את המלחמה ולהציב מסגרת למשא ומתן מפורט על תוכנית הגרעין ונושאים נוספים.

body:
ראש הממשלה נתניהו שוחח בימים האחרונים עם בכירים במפלגות החרדיות וביקש מהם להוריד מסדר היום את חוק הגיוס, ולהמתין עם זה עד לאחר הבחירות.

נתניהו הבהיר בשיחות כי "אין רוב במליאת הכנסת להעביר את החוק רגע לפני הפריימריז והבחירות". על רקע הימים הביטחוניים המורכבים, אמר נתניהו: "זה לא צריך להיות על סדר היום עכשיו".
החרדים בשלב זה טרם אישרו לנתניהו את הבקשה.

(אברהם פריינד)

body:
NEW | U.S. Democrats demand transparency over Israel’s undeclared nuclear arsenal -AlJazeera

Thirty U.S. House Democrats have called for an end to Washington’s “official ambiguity” regarding Israel’s nuclear weapons program, urging Secretary of State Marco Rubio to provide full transparency.

In a joint statement, lawmakers said the U.S. is effectively aligned with a country whose nuclear capabilities it refuses to acknowledge, warning that this double standard undermines non-proliferation efforts in the Middle East.

They stressed that Congress has a constitutional duty to understand the region’s nuclear balance and risks of escalation, noting that Iran’s nuclear pursuit does not occur in a vacuum but is influenced by the perceived capabilities of others, including Israel.

The lawmakers

title:
🇮🇷 Iran denies UAE attacks, warns of “decisive and regret-inducing” response

Iran’s armed forces denied carrying out any recent missile or drone attacks against the UAE, with state media IRIB citing a spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters who said no such operations had taken plac
body:
🇮🇷 Iran denies UAE attacks, warns of “decisive and regret-inducing” response

Iran’s armed forces denied carrying out any recent missile or drone attacks against the UAE, with state media IRIB citing a spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters who said no such operations had taken place and that any action would have been “clearly and officially announced.” 

The spokesman dismissed UAE Defense Ministry accusations as “baseless,” while warning that any attack launched against Iran from UAE territory would trigger a “decisive and regret-inducing” retaliation, and urged Abu Dhabi not to allow its territory to be used by US or Israeli forces.

body:
🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Ministry condemns UAE for cooperating with US & Israel:

"The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran, while condemning the destructive actions of the rulers of Abu Dhabi in coordination with hostile parties against Iran—including the continued hosting of their bases and military equipment—warns them of the dangerous consequences of this situation for regional peace and stability.

Over the past two days, alongside the intensification of unlawful actions and provocative movements by US forces in the region and their maritime activities under the pretext of “freedom of navigation,” officials in Abu Dhabi have also taken positions contrary to the principles of good neighborliness and the Charter of the United Nations by cooperating with hostile sides an

title:
China calls US-Israeli war on Iran illegitimate, urges ceasefire and talks

China said the US–Israeli war against Iran is illegitimate during talks in Beijing between Foreign Minister Wang Yi and his Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi, stressing the need to reduce tensions, achieve a full ceasefire,
body:
China calls US-Israeli war on Iran illegitimate, urges ceasefire and talks

China said the US–Israeli war against Iran is illegitimate during talks in Beijing between Foreign Minister Wang Yi and his Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi, stressing the need to reduce tensions, achieve a full ceasefire, and move toward direct negotiations. 

Araghchi welcomed China’s stance condemning the war and said cooperation between Tehran and Beijing will grow stronger.

title:
More than 30 House Democrats sent a letter to Secretary of State Marco Rubio demanding the Trump administration publicly acknowledge Israel’s undeclared nuclear weapons program amid the stalled US-Israel war with Iran

▪️ Lawmakers say decades-long US policy of ambiguity undermines coherent nonproli
body:
More than 30 House Democrats sent a letter to Secretary of State Marco Rubio demanding the Trump administration publicly acknowledge Israel’s undeclared nuclear weapons program amid the stalled US-Israel war with Iran

▪️ Lawmakers say decades-long US policy of ambiguity undermines coherent nonproliferation policy in the Middle East

▪️ Democrats ask Rubio to brief Congress on Israel’s nuclear arsenal, doctrine, launch systems, and Dimona facility by May 18.
